message:
feat(core): add WebSocket protocol support (RFC 6455)

Implement a minimal WebSocket frame codec and handshake helpers:

- WebSocket struct wrapping async TcpStream for frame-level I/O
- Frame codec: mask/unmask, ping/pong/close, text/binary opcodes
- Handshake helper: websocket_accept_from_key() computes
  Sec-WebSocket-Accept from client's Sec-WebSocket-Key
- Local SHA1 + base64 to avoid external crypto dependencies
- Cancel-correct via asupersync async I/O primitives

476 lines. Re-exported in crate root for ergonomic access.
Also syncs issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
